message.content:
@startuml
participant halon
participant ios1
participant ios2
participant client

box "SNS operation start"
note over halon, ios2 : notification [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]

loop [until all ios are ready]
  halon -> ios2 : repair status request
  halon <- ios2 : repair status reply
end

halon -> ios1 : spiel_repair_start
end box

note over halon, ios2 : repair process

alt [sucessful case]
  halon <- ios1 : notify [(pool, repaired), (disk, repaired)]

  box "SNS status query"
  loop [unil all ios are in IDLE]
    halon -> ios2 : repair status request
    halon <- ios2 : repair status reply [IDLE, IDLE]
  end
  halon -> client : notify [(pool, REPAIRED), (disk, REPAIRED)]
  end box

else [partial repair]
  halon <- ios1 : notify [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]
  note over halon, ios2 : Abort SNS operation

else [transient disk]
  halon <- halon : notify [(disk, transient)]
  note over halon, ios2 : Pause SNS operation

else [failed disk]
  halon <- halon : notify [(disk, failed)]
  note over halon, ios2 : Abort SNS operation

end

@enduml
